codeReview.summary: The fix addresses both prior blocking failures. In fleet_deactivate, fleet_pull, and fleet_rollback, post-operation getHead failures now produce per-host status:"fail" results with explicit HEAD-verification errors instead of being downgraded into success responses, and regression tests now cover mixed-success and all-host-failure cases for all three tools.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The mcp-worker skill and skill-compliance signal remain out of sync with actual MCP verification expectations. The skill still frames REQUIRED manual verification as build + initialize/tools/list, while shared testing guidance now expects a feature-relevant tools/call; this worker also skipped build/manual verification and TDD but the handoff still marked followedProcedure=true.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/skills/mcp-worker/SKILL.md:28-43 requires tests-first and :90-103 requires npm run build plus initialize/tools/list only. .factory/library/user-testing.md:34-37 says MCP validation should include initialize, notifications/initialized, tools/list, and at least one feature-relevant tools/call. Handoff /home/shuv/.factory/missions/53d67669-5ba8-4745-9fd5-71906b40773d/handoffs/2026-03-16T00-47-51-958Z__fix-mcp-head-verification__d0645888-8eae-4e5e-8416-9ef012cee67d.json:14-27 records only test/typecheck/lint, while lines 77-80 still mark followedProcedure=true; the reviewed transcript skeleton for session d0645888-8eae-4e5e-8416-9ef012cee67d explicitly says 'Now let me run the baseline tests first' before implementation and never records a manual stdio verification step.

summary: Pass: the rerun fixes the post-operation HEAD verification bug called out in both prior failed reviews. Deactivate, pull, and rollback now mark hosts failed when HEAD lookup fails after the main operation, and the added regression tests cover those paths.
